0: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS ratio FROM customers;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1: SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' GROUP BY CustomerID ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
2:
SELECT AVG(y.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
4: SELECT YEAR FROM (SELECT LEFT(Date, 4) AS YEAR, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption FROM yearmonth JOIN gasstations ON yearmonth.CustomerID = gasstations.GasStationID WHERE gasstations.Country = 'CZE' GROUP BY YEAR) AS yearly_consumption ORDER BY total_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
3:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
  yearmonth ym
JOIN 
  customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
  ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7: SELECT 'Table consumption does not exist or is not accessible' AS error_message;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
5: SELECT SUBSTRING(y.Date, 5, 2) AS Month, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312' GROUP BY Month ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
8: SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
9: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'discount') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'discount') AS difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
10:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND Currency = 'CZK') - 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND Currency = 'EUR') AS Difference;
	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
13: SELECT MAX(monthly_consumption) AS highest_monthly_consumption FROM (SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS monthly_consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTRING(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY Date) AS monthly_totals;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
12: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Consumption > 528.3 THEN CustomerID END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID)) AS percentage FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '201202%';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
14: SELECT p.Description FROM products p JOIN yearmonth y ON p.ProductID = y.ProductID WHERE y.Date LIKE '201309';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
6:
WITH segment_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
        COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID) AS num_customers
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
annual_average AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        total_consumption / num_customers AS annual_avg_consumption
    FROM 
        segment_consumption
),
segment_diffs AS (
    SELECT 
        annual_avg_consumption AS sme_avg
    FROM 
        annual_average
    WHERE 
        Segment = 'SME'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        annual_avg_consumption AS lam_avg
    FROM 
        annual_average
    WHERE 
        Segment = 'LAM'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        annual_avg_consumption AS kam_avg
    FROM 
        annual_average
    WHERE 
        Segment = 'KAM'
)
SELECT 
    sme_avg - lam_avg AS sme_lam_diff,
    lam_avg - kam_avg AS lam_kam_diff,
    kam_avg - sme_avg AS kam_sme_diff
FROM 
    segment_diffs;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
